title: astragalus armeniacus
intro: Astragalus armeniacus, also known as Huangqi, is a perennial herb plant belonging to the legume family, native to the mountainous regions of China and Central Asia. It is renowned for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, making it a valuable herb in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Astragalus armeniacus include improved immune function, reduced stress and fatigue, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Astragalus armeniacus is commonly prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being and longevity.
